---
title: "Frances Lydia Dyke Acland Troyte"
---

## Frances Lydia Dyke Acland Troyte

**Dates:** (d.1922)

### Description

daughter of Arthur Acland Troyte

### Biography

Eldest of the six daughters of Arthur Acland Troyte, sister of Joanna (Acland Troyte) Harper, who was a Gosling as ‘Albatross’, she married (1863) the Rev. Charles Sandford Bere (d. 1889).

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
